It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo === Events === * In [[:en:Empress Jitō|Jitō Tennō]]'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, [[:en:Fuhonsen|Tomihon-sen]] were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period. * In [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle. * In [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the [[:en:1707 Hōei earthquake|Hōei Earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the [[:en:Hōei eruption|Hōei Great Eruption]]. * From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.
==Months of Yin Fire Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Water overcomes Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Pig (丁亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīnghài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: teikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeonghae (정해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

--> ==Years of Yin Fire Pig== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 27 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)'s years table''' |- ! === Events === * In [[:en:Empress Jitō|Jitō Tennō]]'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, [[:en:Fuhonsen|Tomihon-sen]] were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period. * In [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle. * In [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the [[:en:1707 Hōei earthquake|Hōei Earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the [[:en:Hōei eruption|Hōei Great Eruption]]. * From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.
==Months of Yin Fire Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements === Events === * In [[:en:Empress Jitō|Jitō Tennō]]'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, [[:en:Fuhonsen|Tomihon-sen]] were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period. * In [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle. * In [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the [[:en:1707 Hōei earthquake|Hōei Earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the [[:en:Hōei eruption|Hōei Great Eruption]]. * From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.
==Months of Yin Fire Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements === Events === * In [[:en:Empress Jitō|Jitō Tennō]]'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, [[:en:Fuhonsen|Tomihon-sen]] were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period. * In [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle. * In [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the [[:en:1707 Hōei earthquake|Hōei Earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the [[:en:Hōei eruption|Hōei Great Eruption]]. * From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.
==Months of Yin Fire Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Water overcomes Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Pig (丁亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīnghài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: teikai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeonghae (정해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

--> ==Years of Yin Fire Pig== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 27 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)'s years table''' |- ! === Events === * In [[:en:Empress Jitō|Jitō Tennō]]'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, [[:en:Fuhonsen|Tomihon-sen]] were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period. * In [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle. * In [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the [[:en:1707 Hōei earthquake|Hōei Earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the [[:en:Hōei eruption|Hōei Great Eruption]]. * From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.
==Months of Yin Fire Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Pig== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Water overcomes Fire).

** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeonghae (정해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo === Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo === Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo === Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь === Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō|1=Empress Jitō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen|1=Fuhonsen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake|1=1707 Hōei earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption|1=Hōei eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Pig|kanji=丁亥|romaji=hinoto i|onyomi=teigai|p=dīhài|w=ting-hai|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=deng1 hoi6|j=deng1 hoi6|ci=tɛŋ hɐi|mc=tæŋ ɣəi|oc-bs=tæŋ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь === Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō|1=Empress Jitō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen|1=Fuhonsen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake|1=1707 Hōei earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption|1=Hōei eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Pig|kanji=丁亥|romaji=hinoto i|onyomi=teigai|p=dīhài|w=ting-hai|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=deng1 hoi6|j=deng1 hoi6|ci=tɛŋ hɐi|mc=tæŋ ɣəi|oc-bs=tæŋ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь === Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō|1=Empress Jitō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen|1=Fuhonsen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake|1=1707 Hōei earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption|1=Hōei eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Pig|kanji=丁亥|romaji=hinoto i|onyomi=teigai|p=dīhài|w=ting-hai|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=deng1 hoi6|j=deng1 hoi6|ci=tɛŋ hɐi|mc=tæŋ ɣəi|oc-bs=tæŋ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 24th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Besshi|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Besshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jinshi|ja|1=Yang Earth Rat|2=ja|戊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|WD=Q877261|lt=Pig (亥)|1=Pig relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Water overcomes Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīnghài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: teikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeonghae (정해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Jitō Tennō|1=Empress Jitō}}'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, {{ill|Fuhonsen|en|Fuhonsen|WD=Q11456988|lt=Tomihon-sen|1=Fuhonsen}} were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|WD=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 14 (January 1408 AD) – the {{ill|Ōei Earthquake|ja|応永地震|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Earthquake|1=1408 Ōei earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q105715627}} occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the {{ill|1707 Hōei earthquake|en|1707 Hōei earthquake|WD=Q2001581|lt=Hōei Earthquake|1=1707 Hōei earthquake}}<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the {{ill|Hōei eruption|en|Hōei eruption|WD=Q288045|lt=Hōei Great Eruption|1=Hōei eruption}}.
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teigai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
